title: Bank notes
description: A datapack that adds bank notes in minecraft.
body:
## 📖 What's this datapack?

This datapack adds a new form of currency, bank notes.
You can craft bank notes with iron, gold and diamonds, with this system you can have bank notes in early game mid game and end game.
You can stop selling & trading items for diamonds and start using bills in your server.

## ✅ Features:
- Bank notes
- Multiple recipes
- Coins (soon)
- Wallets (soon)
  
## 📖 How to install
Using this datapack is very simple!

Go to your server files and add it into the datapack folder which is located at world/datapacks.
For the resource pack you can go to mc-packs.net and add the resource pack to your server or add it manually. (The resource pack should be on top of any other packs enabled.)

## 📦 Give Command
/function banknotes:give
